expectations.text: Body text has line-height of 1.5 or greater
expectations.evidence: body uses line-height: var(--leading-normal) where --leading-normal: 1.5; body line-height resolves to 1.5

expectations.text: Defines at least 4 distinct font-size values across the type scale
expectations.evidence: 8 font-size variables defined via CSS custom properties: --text-xs through --text-4xl

expectations.text: Body text container has a max-width to constrain line length
expectations.evidence: max-width constraint applied to the main text container

expectations.text: Uses at least 3 distinct font-weight values across heading levels and body
